name: Wasp Drone

attacks.name: Stinger Shot
attacks.tell: It hovers for a moment and then fires a projectile stinger.
attacks.howToAvoid: Run, jump, or use a shield; it cannot be weapon-parried normally.
attacks.notes: This is its primary damage contribution while staying out of melee range.

attacks.name: Support Scream
attacks.tell: It holds position in the air and releases a shrill scream that affects the nearby swarm.
attacks.howToAvoid: The best defense is to kill the drone before it can cycle the scream again.
attacks.notes: It can heal nearby wasps or empower their attacks with dangerous bleed.

description: A smaller red-marked support variant of the normal wasp. It does not hit as hard on its own, but it is the main reason full wasp swarms spiral out of control.
behavior: It circles the hive with other wasps, stays a bit farther from the player, and alternates between stinger shots and a scream that empowers the swarm.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive on sight and its job is to complicate the fight rather than end you quickly. Its scream can heal nearby allies or grant them a Cutman-like effect that makes subsequent hits far deadlier.
interactionWithCreatures: It stays passive toward wasps and fellow drones while actively supporting them with buffs. Like regular wasps, it is unusually aggressive toward bees and mosquitoes.
strategy: If it appears, it usually deserves target priority. A good ranged weapon removes it before the heals start; in melee it is much more annoying because it prefers to stay high and far away.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. In the Brawny Boy Bin it takes 2 days, and disturbed swarms return after 5 days.
specialTraits: It is immune to fall damage. Its scream can grant heavy healing or a Cutman-like buff that makes the swarm inflict bleed.
